'''Derem City''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] city on the [[Waterworld/Legends|aquatic]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] prior to the [[Great Flood]].

==History==

Derem City was once the [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], until it was sunk by the [[Great Flood]] in over three kilometers of [[Water/Legends|water]]. However, this depth meant that Derem City was also one of the most accessible of the ruins that made up the former [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] civilization, and modern Kaminoans occasionally made pilgrimages to the ruins to contemplate their existence and remind them of their former society.<ref name="GatORW" />

The [[City/Legends|city]] itself was well-conceived and laid out, with glorious sunspires dotting the perimeter. These sunspires would eventually form the anchors for the [[Razoral Reefs]]. The city was well-connected to other parts of the continent through the highly efficient transit tubes, which had been bored through the bedrock and later formed underwater labyrinths; this system would later become home to several vicious predators. The city also housed to the former [[Ministration Hall]], as well as the [[Chol Ka]] gardens. <ref name="GatORW" /> 

Exploration of the Derem City ruins uncovered a vast [[Library/Legends|library]] that appeared to have been maintained by a group of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]], as it contained a sea-crystal [[Qalsneek's holocron|holocron]] that was later discovered to have been created by [[Qalsneek]] the Bull.<ref name="GatORW" />
